entities.context: Python script that fetches intraday heart rate and other timeseries data from the Fitbit API

relationships.context: Script consumes Fitbit's intraday heart rate API endpoints
Uses api_get_json helper to make authenticated API requests
Intraday data access requires Fitbit App Type set to 'Personal'; warnings are emitted if data is missing
